title: convolvulaceae
intro: The Convolvulaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. This family is commonly known as the morning glory family and includes approximately 1,800 species. Convolvulaceae plants are typically annual or perennial vines or shrubs that can be found in various habitats around the world, including tropical, subtropical, and temperate regions. They exhibit a range of adaptations, such as twining stems and showy, often fragrant flowers.
